story.text:
# ✨ Reflect Mirror
**🪞 → 🔄(reflect) → ✓(verify)**
*aria_silverhue · vault · V57*

Reflective verification via the mirror. The Curatrix vertex (V57) is mixing/ceremony/privacy; Aria's mirror is its operational form.

> The mirror keeps what the artist made. Verification by reflection respects the work.

*Keywords:* reflect · mirror · verification · v57
